pi_items.source: Task files do not enforce or encode a strict occupational role; it is a descriptive flavor text.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates the 'auth-system' namespace and applies deployments to it.
setup_task.sh dynamically generates the security specification file at this exact path.
verifier.py retrieves the pass_threshold with a default of 80 and scores the final evaluation against it.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated deployments within the 'auth-system' Kubernetes namespace. The target security specification is dynamically created at '/home/ga/Desktop/identity_security_spec.yaml'. The evaluation script confirms the pass threshold is 80 points.
